subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make thou mention of him who hath been named Muhammad-Ibrahim, that this mention may draw him unto the Most Sublime Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلمی الاعلی اذکر من سمی بمحمد ابراهیم لیجذبه الذکر الی الافق الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
